\tzpentry{ID4216}{Sideband Pi Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4216 introduces Sideband Pi Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} f_{\text{sideband}} = f_{\text{GW}} \pm n\Omega_{\odot}/(2\pi), \quad n \in \mathbb{Z} \end{equation}
